data.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — All ACs verified: file executable, 34 test_ functions (>=15), .test-index RED marker present, ruff check and format pass. Tests correctly RED: 13 fail (features not yet in SKILL.md), 4 pass (pre-existing content: non-epic routing, preplanning ref, brainstorm/proceed in existing escalation sections).
